prompt:
Subject: Afternoon Poolside

Person/Expression: Woman in her 20s. Fair skin leaning towards bright ivory beige, smooth skin texture with a hint of pink. Soft highlights on cheeks, tip of nose, shoulders, and collarbone. Precise, elegant doll-like Japanese-style makeup. Pale rose pink blush, champagne beige and pink-brown eye shadow, long slender eyelashes, natural tear bags, soft light brown eyebrows, sheer pink beige gloss lips. Small clear catchlights in the eyes. A modest, soft smile while looking at the camera.

Clothing/Pose: Simple white triangle-type swimwear. Sitting on a wooden deck by a resort poolside. Stretching the left leg into the pool, lightly kicking the water surface with toes to create small splashes. The other knee is naturally raised, with an elbow resting on the knee and a hand against the cheek. The other hand is placed on the deck beside the body, with fingers naturally relaxed. Relaxed posture, an elegant and refreshing summer portrait.

Background/Light: Bright outdoor resort pool. Transparent blue pool surface and fine reflections in the foreground, with small splashes at the feet. Midground features a wooden deck, white parasols, white sofas, and potted tropical greenery. Background has a white pergola and faintly blurred resort architecture. Strong summer sunlight from the upper left, creating bright highlights on cheeks, shoulders, collarbone, legs, and water surface. Shadows fall towards the lower right. Pale blue reflected light from the water surface bounces back onto the legs and under the deck.

Composition/Camera: Vertical composition, 2:3. Full-body poolside portrait. The subject is positioned largely from center to slightly right, creating depth with the leg line and the pool surface. Camera at a slightly low eye level, natural distance. Softly blurred background with shallow depth of field, focusing on the eyes and face. Bright summer white space left in the sky and background.

Texture/Style: Realistic photography. Careful depiction of natural skin grain, fine downy hair, subtle water droplets, and the flow of individual hair strands. Hair is light milk tea ash brown. Thin see-through bangs, layered cut along the face, medium-long down to below shoulders. Ends are loosely curled inward, giving a fluffy airiness and natural clumping. Based on white, milk tea brown, turquoise blue, and plant green for a clean resort photo look.

Negative: Unnatural face or gaze, excessive skin correction, plastic-like skin, extra or missing fingers, fused limbs, broken joints, deformed toes, broken swimwear straps, poor contact with deck or water, unnatural splashes, shadows inconsistent with light source, excessive sexual emphasis, vulgar poses, unnecessary people or objects, garbled text, logos, watermarks.
